hero.heading:
Architected with care.
Stewarded with pride.
hero.sub: Behind every enduring portfolio is an operation that works so soundly, no one notices it. We built NuBright for managers who treat operational rigor as a competitive advantage.
hero.rulerCaption: From 0 to 1, we hold ourselves to the most rigorous measure.

bridges.services: Explore our approach across every chapter of your fund
bridges.about: See who we are, and how we deliver on that promise
bridges.technology: See the engine behind the numbers

timeline.heading: From launch to wind-down.
timeline.sub: No handoffs. No gaps. No surprises. We serve both open-end and closed-end structures — with the same standard of thoroughness, from day one to the very end.
timeline.boundary: We DO NOT give investment advice. We DO NOT manage assets. We DO NOT provide legal or tax opinions. We calculate. We reconcile. We report.

s1.title: Fund Formation
s1.sub: With you, when you lay the foundation.
s1.quote: The first year determines the tenth.
s1.i4: Map launch timeline and manage execution
s1.i5: Establish fund accounting framework and chart of accounts

s2.title: Capital Formation
s2.sub: With you, when you earn their trust.
s2.quote: Raising capital is hard enough. We keep the back office out of your critical path.
s2.i1: Clear and onboard investors with KYC/AML rigor
s2.i3: Process capital calls and notify with clarity
s2.i4: Set up investor communication and reporting
s2.i5: Maintain investor register and capital account records

s3.title: Fund Operations
s3.sub: With you, when you focus on the vision.
s3.quote: We calculate. We verify. We document. You review.
s3.i4: Interpret and implement side letter provisions
s3.i5: Coordinate annual audits and AEOI filings

s4.title: Liquidity & Exit
s4.sub: With you, when you deliver the legacy.
s4.quote: The final stage matters as much as the first.
s4.i2: Reconcile and close all investor capital accounts
s4.i3: Issue final investor statements and distribute remaining capital
s4.i4: Close out all service provider accounts and terminate third-party agreements
s4.i5: File final regulatory returns, dissolution documents, and archive fund records

cta.sub: No pitch decks. No sales fluff. Just a real conversation about what you're building, where you're heading, and we'll show you how our approach, technology, and decade-deep team can support you through every chapter.

investorPortal.title:
24/7 access.
One secure gateway. Full visibility.
investorPortal.sub: Investors get round-the-clock access to their portfolio data, documents, and capital activity.
investorPortal.cardDesc: Dedicated one-stop subscription/redemption application and information inquiry — Access portfolio holdings, fund NAVs, transaction records, periodic reports, and income details anytime, anywhere. Delivers a fully transparent, always-on investment service experience.

f1.title: Easy Onboarding
f1.body: Complete your profile and submit required documents digitally via "My Profile," powered by dynamic KYC/AML workflows. Quick, secure, entirely paperless, and fully compliant from the first touchpoint.

f2.title: Streamlined Transactions
f2.body: Initiate subscription and redemption requests online with a simple, guided process. Track request status in real time, from submission through to registration.

f3.title: Full Transparency
f3.body: Access portfolio holdings, NAVs, transaction records, periodic reports, and fund documents — anytime, anywhere.

managerPortal.title: One platform. Full control.
managerPortal.sub: A unified command centre for fund managers to oversee operations, track performance, and manage investors — all in one place, in real time. The same data your investors see. The control you need to act.

f1.title: Integrated Data View & Real-Time Queries
f1.body: Aggregates fund, valuation, and investor data in a single, unified view. Real-time dashboards provide a single source of truth for fund performance and investor capital activity, enabling proactive decision-making with complete visibility into every aspect of fund operations.

f2.title: Digital Workflows & Internal Controls
f2.body: Online submission, review, and approval for NAV calculations, investor servicing, and compliance checks. End-to-end digital workflows with full traceability. Enhances internal control transparency and audit readiness.

f3.title: Digital Document Management
f3.body: Securely archives all fund legal, operational, financial, and investor documents in one centralized repository with granular permission controls. Unified, secure, and fully traceable filing. Enables rapid response to audits and regulatory requests while ensuring that sensitive information is accessible only to those with proper authorization.

technologyHero.sub: We didn't build these systems to look impressive. We built them because we refused to let service quality depend on individual performance. Every workflow is standardized. Every action is traceable.

aboutHero.heading:
Founded 2019.
Core team together since 2013.
aboutHero.sub: We knew fund administration could be done better. So we built our own firm. Three beliefs still guide us.

s1.heading: Start with the craft.
s1.body: We are intentionally sized so every client gets the attention of someone who knows your fund. Small enough to care. Rigorous enough to be trusted. We don't just assign a relationship manager; we assign a dedicated team that knows your fund's DNA.

s2.heading: Master the details. See the whole.
s2.body: Accuracy and perspective are not trade-offs. The small things make the big picture right. We make sure both are.

s3.heading: Build for the long term.
s3.body: We built our own technology — for managers and for their investors. This is not a black box. Our source of truth is transparent, and your data is never a byproduct. No licensing gaps. No vendor lock-in. Our architecture is built with a zero-trust security model, ensuring your data's integrity and confidentiality at every layer. Our team has worked together for over a decade, and our systems are growing with us. We are not building for this year; we are building for the next twenty.
